Expense ratio 0.68% Benchmark Nifty 500 TR INR AUM ₹91335 Cr Inception Date 1 January, 2013 Min Lumpsum/SIP ₹100/₹100 Exit Load 1.0% Lock In No Lock-in TurnOver 26.57% Risk Very High Risk About HDFC Flexi Cap Fund HDFC Flexi Cap is a flexi-cap mutual fund launched on 1st January 1995. These funds follow a diversified equity investment strategy where they invest in companies across all market captialization and adjust allocations based on market conditions. The fund uses Nifty 500 TRI as its benchmark. Nifty 500 represents the broader market and helps the fund compare its returns with those of other companies HDFC Mutual Fund follows a bottom-up approach , which involves paying attention to individual businesses instead of macroeconomic factors. They also pay close attention to Quantitative (Growth, Cash Flows, Risks) and Qualitative (Management, Track Record, Insights) aspects of the companies. Staying true to the nature of the fund, they diversify across market caps and asset classes. Diversification is achieved through a balanced mix of asset types, loan sizes, contract volumes, and geographies, while risk in less diversified pools is mitigated using credit enhancements. HDFC Flexi Cap maintains a strong focus on industries like Financials, Automobiles, Healthcare, Technology, etc. Know more about HDFC Flexi Cap Fund Fund Manager Amit Ganatra Fund Manager of  HDFC Flexi Cap Fund, since 1 February 2026 Dhruv Muchhal Fund Manager of  HDFC Flexi Cap Fund, since 22 June 2023 Learn more about HDFC Mutual Fund AUM Change All changes are between Jan'26 and Mar'26 Parameters Mar'26 Feb'26 Jan'26 AUM ₹ 1L Cr ₹ 1L Cr ₹ 97.5K Cr AUM of the fund stands at 1L Cr as of Mar'26 AUM has remained same  between Mar'26 and Feb'26 Compare HDFC Flexi Cap Fund HDFC Flexi Cap Fund VS Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund Frequently Asked Questions for HDFC Flexi Cap Fund How do I invest in HDFC Flexi Cap Fund? INDmoney makes it simple to invest in the HDFC Flexi Cap Fund. To do so, follow the steps below: Download the INDmoney app. Search for ‘HDFC Flexi Cap Fund’. Select whether you want to invest in SIP or lump sum. Enter the amount you wish to invest. Set up payments via bank mandate or UPI. What is the current NAV of HDFC Flexi Cap Fund? The NAV of the fund today is ₹2191.73. NAV or Net Asset Value is the per unit price of a mutual fund. For example, if the NAV of a fund is ₹10, it means you can get 1000 units of that mutual fund at ₹10,000. What is the return on the fund? HDFC Flexi Cap Fund fund has generated a return of 6.37% in 1 year, 21.51% in 3 years, 21.21% in 5 years. Who is the fund manager of HDFC Flexi Cap Fund? The fund managers are Amit Ganatra, Dhruv Muchhal. What is the exit load of the fund? The exit load is 1% if redeemed in 0-1 Years. Exit load is a fee levied for ‘exiting’ the fund earlier than a stipulated period, usually 1 year. What is the expense ratio of the fund? The expense ratio is 0.68%. The Expense Ratio is a fee charged for managing the fund. This includes commissions, administrative costs etc. What is the AUM of the fund? The AUM of the fund is ₹91335 Cr. AUM stands for Assets Under Management. It refers to the total assets managed by the fund. What are the top holdings of HDFC Flexi Cap Fund? The top 3 holdings of the fund are ICICI Bank Ltd(8.82%), HDFC Bank Ltd(7.04%), Axis Bank Ltd(6.87%) Invest Now
